personal.preferred_title: AWS Data Engineer | SQL, Oracle, Redshift, Glue & Analytics

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience building scalable data pipelines, analytical datasets, warehouse structures, metrics, dashboards, and data quality processes for business decision support. Strong hands-on background in SQL, Oracle, Python, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, Athena-style analytics, ETL/ELT, OLAP-style reporting, query optimization, and stakeholder-facing insights. Experienced translating ambiguous business problems into reliable data models, curated datasets, reporting workflows, and executive-ready analytics in regulated enterprise environments.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Built scalable analytical datasets using SQL, Oracle, Redshift, Python, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, AWS S3, Glue, and Athena-style lake access patterns.
Designed OLAP-style reporting structures, historical schemas, and curated datasets to support capacity analytics, seasonal forecasting, executive reporting, and operational decision support.
Translated infrastructure and business questions into technical data requirements, analytical datasets, dashboards, and repeatable reporting outputs for senior stakeholders.
Developed optimized SQL queries, validation routines, reconciliation checks, and troubleshooting workflows to improve data integrity, accuracy, and reporting confidence.
Built dashboards and reporting workflows using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, and enterprise telemetry to quantify utilization trends, capacity risks, and operational outcomes.
Automated recurring reporting and data preparation processes to reduce manual effort and enable more consistent self-service analytics for stakeholders.
Recommended improvements to source feeds, transformation logic, and reporting datasets to simplify analysis and improve accuracy of downstream outputs.
Documented data definitions, transformation logic, pipeline behavior, validation rules, and operational procedures for maintainability and knowledge transfer.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for critical revenue-generating hospitality systems.
Built analytics and reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical systems, supporting dashboarding, transaction tracing, and production troubleshooting.
Collaborated with engineering teams to preserve reporting continuity and monitoring quality during Dynatrace upgrade and TLS 1.2 cutover.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly export processes.
Supported a large enterprise monitoring environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created technical documentation, repeatable procedures, client training materials, and knowledge-sharing content for monitoring onboarding, reporting, and support workflows.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, throughput limits, thread pressure, heap usage, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for production release decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting very high transaction volume.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to ensure integrity during phased migration cutover.
Optimized Oracle transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Built Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, SQL, and C/C++ processing components for high-volume structured billing and reporting data workflows.
Improved billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.AWS Data Engineering: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Data Lake Patterns, Cloud Data Pipelines, AWS EMR Concepts
skills.BI / Analytics Engineering: Metrics Datasets, OLAP Reporting Structures, Business Intelligence Data Models, Dashboards, Self-Service Analytics, Ad-Hoc Analysis, Measurement Frameworks
skills.Programming & Querying: SQL, Oracle SQL, Python, Pandas, PySpark, Apache Spark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, Java, C++
skills.ETL / ELT: Data Extraction, Data Transformation, Data Loading, ETL Pipelines, ELT Patterns, Data Integration, Data Quality, Data Validation, Reconciliation
skills.Data Modeling: Data Warehousing, OLAP Modeling, Historical Schemas, Star/Snowflake Schema Concepts, Data Structures, Query Optimization, Source-to-Target Mapping
skills.Databases / Stores: Oracle, Oracle RAC, Amazon Redshift, PostgreSQL, MySQL, DB2, Object Storage Concepts, NoSQL / Key-Value Concepts, Graph Database Concepts
skills.Reporting & Visualization: Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Executive Reporting, Operational Analytics, Dashboard Data Preparation, Stakeholder Reporting
skills.Data Operations: Pipeline Auditing, Operational Data Quality Troubleshooting, Documentation, Data Integrity Checks, Source Feed Improvement, Production Support
skills.Business Acumen: Ambiguous Problem Translation, Stakeholder Communication, Decision Support, Capacity and Cost-Aware Analytics, Requirements Translation
skills.Adjacent AWS / Learning: Kinesis Concepts, Firehose Concepts, AWS Lambda Concepts, IAM Roles and Permissions Concepts, EMR Concepts

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, Parquet/Snappy storage layouts, and analytics access patterns for enterprise-scale reporting.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting platform that transformed enterprise telemetry into validated forecasting datasets, reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90%, and produced capacity bottleneck predictions 6 months ahead.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic pipeline using Python, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, and sentence-transformers for semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, structured artifact generation, quality gates, and application tracking.
